channel.title: Claude Code on See Hiong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Claude Code on See Hiong's Blog

item.title: Claude Code Meets Self-Hosted Penpot
item.description: Run Penpot inside a Talos Kubernetes homelab, connect it to Claude Code with penpot-mcp, and let AI design directly on the canvas from the terminal. The setup is demonstrated by redesigning a client-side PDF merging tool without touching the Penpot UI.
